tools.Name: nanochat
tools.Description: A minimal, hackable experimental harness for training and fine-tuning small LLMs on a single GPU node.
tools.Use_Case: Training and testing custom LLMs (e.g., GPT-2 capability models) on limited hardware budgets.

tools.Name: Heretic
tools.Description: A tool for fully automatic censorship removal (abliteration) from transformer-based language models.
tools.Use_Case: Removing safety alignment or 'censorship' from LLMs without requiring expensive retraining.

tools.Name: browser-use
tools.Description: An open-source library that enables AI agents to interact with and automate tasks on web browsers.
tools.Use_Case: Automating web-based tasks like form-filling, data retrieval, or navigating complex UI interfaces.
